message:
fix: sentinel-only regression check + 5m timeout on contributor profiles (#1524)

- Regression check now only watches 3 sentinel contributors (clubanderson,
  KPRoche, MikeSpreitzer) instead of all 70+. A >10% drop in any sentinel
  reliably catches scoring bugs without being tripped by normal churn.

- Add timeout-minutes: 5 to the contributor profiles step so it cannot
  block the commit+push when GitHub API is slow or rate-limited.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -43,6 +43,7 @@ jobs:
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.LEADERBOARD_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: node scripts/generate-contributor-profiles.mjs
+        timeout-minutes: 5
         continue-on-error: true
 
       - name: Commit and push if changed
